---
title: "Accessory_genome_analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Whole genome sequence data from 139 STEC O157 were included in the below analysis. This is based off Dr Sara Burgess's "AMR dairy calf project - modelling analysis". A gene presence absence matrix was generated using Roary (v.3.13.0), and the core and accessory genomes were extracted from the gene_presence_absence.csv, with data tied along the way based on what was needed for the functions.

https://link.springer.com/article/10.1186/s12915-023-01562-w#Sec11 https://journals.asm.org/doi/10.1128/spectrum.00956-25 https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s10096-023-04600-1#Sec2 https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12772303/#s2

```{r libraries, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
# Load libraries
library(vegan)
library(BiocManager)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(gtools)
library(effects)
library(sjstats)
library(lme4)
library(dbstats)
library(ggplot2)
library(glue)
library(randomForest)
library(car)
library(performance)
```

```{r Roary_core_accessory, results = 'hide'}
setwd("~/STEC_139/Objective_2_pangenome_analysis")

# lets try combining column 1 and 3 together as column 1 is all unique, but column 3 gives the actual annotation. 

# Load Panaroo matrix
gene_matrix <- read.csv("~/STEC_139/Objective_2_pangenome_analysis/Data/gene_presence_absence_panaroo.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE,  # prevent factor conversion
  check.names = FALSE       # prevents R from changing isolate names
)

# combining columns 1 and 3 making new variable called full_name
gene_matrix$full_name<-paste(gene_matrix$Gene, gene_matrix$Annotation)

gene_reordered<-gene_matrix[c("full_name", setdiff(names(gene_matrix), "full_name"))]
print(gene_reordered)

# Save it to make things easier
write.csv(gene_reordered, "gene_reordered.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# ok, lets load in the new matrix
gene_reordered_matrix <- read.csv(
  "gene_reordered.csv",
  row.names = 1,       # first column is gene names
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,  # prevent factor conversion
  check.names = FALSE       # prevents R from changing isolate names
)

# the isolate names are werid, so lets sort those out
colnames(gene_reordered_matrix) <- sub("^fix_", "", colnames(gene_reordered_matrix))

# Id gene_matrix identifing isolate columns
isolate_cols <- grep("^EcCa", colnames(gene_reordered_matrix))

# Convert isolate columns to binary 0/1
gene_reordered_matrix_binary <- gene_reordered_matrix %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(isolate_cols),
                ~ ifelse(.x == "" | is.na(.x), 0, 1)))

# Add TotalCount = number of isolates where gene is present
gene_reordered_matrix_binary <- gene_reordered_matrix_binary %>%
  mutate(TotalCount = rowSums(across(all_of(isolate_cols))))

#The Roary default for the core genome is that 99% of the isolates must contain the gene therefore to be included in the core genome 138 of the genomes must have a gene
139*0.99

########
##Core##
########

#Selecting those rows that are part of the core genome 
gene_reordered_matrix_core<- gene_reordered_matrix_binary %>%
  filter(TotalCount >= 138)

summary(gene_reordered_matrix_binary$TotalCount)

#Removing the the TotalCount column
gene_reordered_matrix_core <- gene_reordered_matrix_core %>%
  select(-TotalCount)

#Remove "_medaka" and "fix" from header names - this was done above
#gene_reordered_matrix_core <- gene_reordered_matrix_core%>%
 # rename_with(~gsub("_medaka$", "", .), ends_with("_medaka"))

colnames(gene_reordered_matrix_core) <- sub("^fix_", "", colnames(gene_reordered_matrix_core))

# Re-identify isolate columns (names have changed)
isolate_cols_core <- grep("^EcCa", colnames(gene_reordered_matrix_core))

# Subset to isolate-only matrix
core_binary_only <- gene_reordered_matrix_core[, isolate_cols_core]

# Transpose
transposed_core <- t(core_binary_only)

# Reorder isolates to match metadata
transposed_core <- transposed_core[order(rownames(transposed_core)), ]

# Compute the distance matrix
dist_matrix_core <- vegdist(transposed_core, method = "jaccard", binary = TRUE)


#############
##Accessory##
#############

#Selecting those rows that are part of the accessory genome
gene_reordered_matrix_accessory <- gene_reordered_matrix_binary %>%
  filter(TotalCount < 138)

#Remove the TotalCount column
gene_reordered_matrix_accessory <- gene_reordered_matrix_accessory %>%
  select(-TotalCount)

#Remove "_medaka" from header names
gene_reordered_matrix_accessory <- gene_reordered_matrix_accessory%>%
  rename_with(~gsub("_medaka$", "", .), ends_with("_medaka"))

# Re-identify isolate columns (names have changed)
isolate_cols_accessory <- grep("^EcCa", colnames(gene_reordered_matrix_accessory))

# Subset to isolate-only matrix
accessory_binary_only <- gene_reordered_matrix_accessory[, isolate_cols_accessory]

#Transpose table so that columns become rows
transposed_accessory <- t(accessory_binary_only)

# Reorder isolates to match metadata
transposed_accessory  <- transposed_accessory [order(rownames(transposed_accessory )), ]


################
# Convert to dataframe if not already
transposed_accessory_df <- as.data.frame(transposed_accessory)

# Optional: add rownames as a column so editable
transposed_accessory_df$Isolate_ID <- rownames(transposed_accessory_df)

# Reorder so Isolate_ID is first column
transposed_accessory_df <- transposed_accessory_df %>%
  select(Isolate_ID, everything())

# Export to CSV
write.csv(transposed_accessory_df, "~/STEC_139/Objective_2_pangenome_analysis/Data/transposed_accessory_for_excel.csv", row.names = FALSE)

############################
## Double checking things ##
############################


# Number of isolates (columns before transpose)
ncol(accessory_binary_only)
# Or after transpose (rows) - lets just double check please
nrow(transposed_accessory)


# Original isolates
all_isolates <- colnames(core_binary_only)  # original gene_reordered_matrix_binary columns
# Isolates in accessory
accessory_isolates <- colnames(accessory_binary_only)

# Check which isolates are missing
missing_in_accessory <- setdiff(all_isolates, accessory_isolates)
missing_in_accessory
```

```{r accessory_data_setup}
# Load in metadata, isolate IDs should be matching now
metadata <- read.csv("~/STEC_139/Objective_2_pangenome_analysis/Data/metadata_Apr26.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
# The transposed 
transposed_accessory_for_excel <- read.csv("~/STEC_139/Objective_2_pangenome_analysis/Data/transposed_accessory_for_excel.csv", stringsAsFactors=TRUE)

# compute distance matrix
dist_matrix_accessory <- vegdist(transposed_accessory_for_excel %>% select(-Isolate_ID),
                                 method = "jaccard", binary = TRUE)
```

```{r permanova_accessory}
####################
## beta diversity ##
####################

#Permanova of accessory genes
set.seed(312)
perm_accessory <- adonis2(dist_matrix_accessory ~ Sample_site , data = metadata, permutations = 1000, by = "margin")

perm_accessory

```

```{r PCoA_accessory_analysis}
# Number of isolates in distance matrix
length(attr(dist_matrix_accessory, "Labels"))

# Classical multidimensional scaling (PCoA)
accessory_pcoa <- cmdscale(dist_matrix_accessory, eig = TRUE, k = 2)  # k = 2 for 2D

# Make dataframe of PCoA coordinates
pcoa_coords <- as.data.frame(accessory_pcoa$points)
colnames(pcoa_coords) <- c("PCoA1", "PCoA2")

# Add isolate IDs (Excel-corrected dataframe)
pcoa_coords$Isolate_ID <- transposed_accessory_for_excel$Isolate_ID

# Quick check
head(pcoa_coords)

# Ensure the metadata has the same Isolate_ID column
pcoa_plot_data <- pcoa_coords %>%
  left_join(metadata, by = "Isolate_ID")

head(pcoa_plot_data)


# Eigenvalues from PCoA
eig_values <- accessory_pcoa$eig

# Calculate proportion of variance for each axis
variance_explained <- round(100 * eig_values / sum(eig_values), 1)

# Variance explained by PCoA1 and PCoA2
variance_explained[1:2]

##############
## Plotting ##
##############

# SBI
ggplot(pcoa_plot_data, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2, color = SBI)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Accessory Genome PCoA",
    x = paste0("PCoA1 (", variance_explained[1], "%)"),
    y = paste0("PCoA2 (", variance_explained[2], "%)")
  )

# sample site
ggplot(pcoa_plot_data, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2, color = Sample_site)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Accessory Genome PCoA",
    x = paste0("PCoA1 (", variance_explained[1], "%)"),
    y = paste0("PCoA2 (", variance_explained[2], "%)")
  )
```

```{r signif_genes}

##################
## Signif genes ##
##################

accessory_binary <- transposed_accessory_for_excel %>%
  select(-Isolate_ID)

# Ensure numeric 0/1
accessory_binary[] <- lapply(accessory_binary, function(x) as.numeric(x > 0))

# Remove zero-variance genes
accessory_binary_var <- accessory_binary[, apply(accessory_binary, 2, sd) > 0]

# PC1 signif genes

pc1_gene_cor <- apply(
  accessory_binary_var,
  2, function(x) cor(x, accessory_pcoa$points[, 1]))

pc1_df <- data.frame(
  Gene = names(pc1_gene_cor),
  Correlation_with_PCoA1 = pc1_gene_cor) %>% arrange(desc(abs(Correlation_with_PCoA1)))

head(pc1_df, 10)

# PC2 signif genes

pc2_gene_cor <- apply(
  accessory_binary_var,
  2, function(x) cor(x, accessory_pcoa$points[, 2]))

pc2_df <- data.frame(
  Gene = names(pc2_gene_cor),
  Correlation_with_PCoA2 = pc2_gene_cor) %>% arrange(desc(abs(Correlation_with_PCoA2)))

head(pc2_df, 10)

# Lets save the files for easy access

write.csv(pc1_df, "pc1_df.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(pc2_df, "pc2_df.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r stx_genes}
###############
## stx genes ##
###############

# Find stx in a case insensitive manner
stx_genes <- grep("stx", rownames(pc1_df), ignore.case = TRUE, value = TRUE)

selected_data_stx_genes <- pc1_df[stx_genes, ]

print(selected_data_stx_genes)
```

```{r keeping_farm_84}
##############
## farm 84 ###
##############

str(transposed_accessory_for_excel)

# Lets list the isolates individually, just so I make sure I have them all
keep_isolates <- c(
"EcCa531a","EcCa531b","EcCa531c","EcCa531d",
"EcCa532a","EcCa533a",
"EcCa534a","EcCa534b","EcCa534c","EcCa534d",
"EcCa535a","EcCa535b","EcCa535c","EcCa535d",
"EcCa536a","EcCa536b","EcCa536c","EcCa536d","EcCa536e",
"EcCa539a",
"EcCa540a","EcCa540b",
"EcCa541a","EcCa541b","EcCa541c",
"EcCa542a","EcCa542b","EcCa542c",
"EcCa543a","EcCa543b","EcCa543c","EcCa543d",
"EcCa626a","EcCa626b","EcCa626c","EcCa626d",
"EcCa628a","EcCa629a_08",
"EcCa630a","EcCa630b","EcCa630c","EcCa630d",
"EcCa631a","EcCa631b",
"EcCa632a","EcCa632b",
"EcCa633a","EcCa633b","EcCa633c","EcCa633d",
"EcCa637a",
"EcCa645a","EcCa645b","EcCa645c",
"EcCa646a","EcCa646b","EcCa646c","EcCa646d_comb",
"EcCa647a","EcCa647b","EcCa647c","EcCa647d"
)

# check we have them all
length(keep_isolates)

# make dataframe
transposed_accessory_filtered <- transposed_accessory_for_excel[
  transposed_accessory_for_excel$Isolate_ID %in% keep_isolates, 
]

# more checking
nrow(transposed_accessory_filtered)

setdiff(keep_isolates, rownames(transposed_accessory_for_excel))

```

```{r perm_farm84}
# load in the corresponding metadata
metadata_filtered <- read.csv("~/STEC_139/Objective_2_pangenome_analysis/Data/metadata_filtered.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# compute distance matrix
dist_matrix_accessory_filtered <- vegdist(transposed_accessory_filtered %>% select(-Isolate_ID),
                                 method = "jaccard", binary = TRUE)
####################
## beta diversity ##
####################

#Permanova of accessory genes
set.seed(312)
perm_accessory <- adonis2(dist_matrix_accessory_filtered  ~ Sample_site , data = metadata_filtered, permutations = 1000, by = "margin")

perm_accessory
```

```{r PCoA_farm84}
# Number of isolates in distance matrix
length(attr(dist_matrix_accessory_filtered, "Labels"))

# Classical multidimensional scaling (PCoA)
accessory_pcoa_filtered <- cmdscale(dist_matrix_accessory_filtered, eig = TRUE, k = 2)

# Make dataframe of PCoA coordinates
pcoa_coords_filtered <- as.data.frame(accessory_pcoa_filtered$points)
colnames(pcoa_coords_filtered) <- c("PCoA1", "PCoA2")

# Add isolate IDs (must match order of PCoA output)
pcoa_coords_filtered$Isolate_ID <- transposed_accessory_filtered$Isolate_ID


# Quick check
head(pcoa_coords_filtered)


# Join metadata
pcoa_plot_data_filtered <- pcoa_coords_filtered %>%
  left_join(metadata_filtered, by = "Isolate_ID")


head(pcoa_plot_data_filtered)


# Eigenvalues from PCoA
eig_values_filtered <- accessory_pcoa_filtered$eig

# Calculate proportion of variance
variance_explained_filtered <- round(100 * eig_values_filtered / sum(eig_values_filtered), 1)

# Variance explained by first two axes
variance_explained_filtered[1:2]

##############
## Plotting ##
##############

# Plot by SBI
ggplot(pcoa_plot_data_filtered, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2, color = SBI)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Accessory Genome PCoA (Filtered)",
    x = paste0("PCoA1 (", variance_explained_filtered[1], "%)"),
    y = paste0("PCoA2 (", variance_explained_filtered[2], "%)")
  )


# Plot by Sample_site
ggplot(pcoa_plot_data_filtered, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2, color = Sample_site)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Accessory Genome PCoA (Filtered)",
    x = paste0("PCoA1 (", variance_explained_filtered[1], "%)"),
    y = paste0("PCoA2 (", variance_explained_filtered[2], "%)")
  )
```

```{r signif_genes_farm84}
# Create binary accessory matrix (filtered)
accessory_binary_filtered <- transposed_accessory_filtered %>%
  select(-Isolate_ID)

# Ensure numeric 0/1
accessory_binary_filtered[] <- lapply(
  accessory_binary_filtered,
  function(x) as.numeric(x > 0)
)

# Remove zero-variance genes
accessory_binary_var_filtered <- accessory_binary_filtered[
  , apply(accessory_binary_filtered, 2, sd) > 0
]

##################
## Signif genes ##
##################

# PC1 signif genes
pc1_gene_cor_filtered <- apply(
  accessory_binary_var_filtered,
  2,
  function(x) cor(x, accessory_pcoa_filtered$points[, 1])
)

pc1_df_filtered <- data.frame(
  Gene = names(pc1_gene_cor_filtered),
  Correlation_with_PCoA1 = pc1_gene_cor_filtered
) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(Correlation_with_PCoA1)))

head(pc1_df_filtered, 10)

# PC2 signif genes
pc2_gene_cor_filtered <- apply(
  accessory_binary_var_filtered,
  2,
  function(x) cor(x, accessory_pcoa_filtered$points[, 2])
)

pc2_df_filtered <- data.frame(
  Gene = names(pc2_gene_cor_filtered),
  Correlation_with_PCoA2 = pc2_gene_cor_filtered
) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(Correlation_with_PCoA2)))

head(pc2_df_filtered, 10)


# Lets save the files for easy access
write.csv(pc1_df_filtered, "~/STEC_139/Objective_2_pangenome_analysis/Data/pc1_df_filtered.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(pc2_df_filtered, "~/STEC_139/Objective_2_pangenome_analysis/Data/pc2_df_filtered.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r stx_genes_farm84}
###############
## stx genes ##
###############

# where are they? 
# Find stx in a case insensitive manner
stx_genes_filtered <- grep("stx", rownames(pc1_df_filtered), ignore.case = TRUE, value = TRUE)

selected_data_stx_genes_filtered <- pc1_df[stx_genes, ]

print(selected_data_stx_genes_filtered)
```

```{r alphadiv_farm84}
#####################
## alpha diversity ##
#####################

library(vegan)
library(dplyr)

# Remove isolate ID column
accessory_matrix <- transposed_accessory_filtered %>%
  select(-Isolate_ID)

# Ensure all columns are numeric
accessory_matrix[] <- lapply(accessory_matrix, as.numeric)

# Check structure
str(accessory_matrix)

# Richness
richness <- rowSums(accessory_matrix)

# Shannon diversity
shannon_div <- diversity(accessory_matrix, index = "shannon")

# Simpson diversity
simpson_div <- diversity(accessory_matrix, index = "simpson")

# Combine into dataframe
diversity_results <- data.frame(
  Isolate_ID = transposed_accessory_filtered$Isolate_ID,
  Richness = richness,
  Shannon = shannon_div,
  Simpson = simpson_div
)

head(diversity_results)

diversity_results <- diversity_results %>%
  left_join(metadata_filtered, by = "Isolate_ID")

##############
## Plotting ##
##############

ggplot(diversity_results,
       aes(x = Sample_site,
           y = Richness,
           fill = Sample_site)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(diversity_results,
       aes(x = Sample_site,
           y = Shannon,
           fill = Sample_site)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r alphadiv_samplesite_farm84}
diversity_summary <- diversity_results %>%
  group_by(Sample_site) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),

    Mean_Richness = round(mean(Richness), 2),
    SD_Richness = round(sd(Richness), 2),

    Mean_Shannon = round(mean(Shannon), 2),
    SD_Shannon = round(sd(Shannon), 2),

    Mean_Simpson = round(mean(Simpson), 2),
    SD_Simpson = round(sd(Simpson), 2)
  )

diversity_summary

kruskal.test(Richness ~ Sample_site,
             data = diversity_results)

kruskal.test(Shannon ~ Sample_site,
             data = diversity_results)

kruskal.test(Simpson ~ Sample_site,
             data = diversity_results)
```
